metadata.name: Consolidate LTL Shipments into a Multi-Stop FTL

description: A planner has several LTL shipments going to the same region and wants to consolidate them into a more cost-effective multi-stop full truckload.

nodes.task_description: Identify all pending LTL shipments going to a specific region (e.g., the Southeast).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of 5 LTL shipments.

nodes.task_description: Use a load planning tool to see if the shipments can fit on one truck and calculate the potential cost savings.

expected_outcome.value: The tool confirms the shipments can be consolidated, saving 20% on freight costs.

nodes.task_description: Create a new multi-stop FTL shipment and assign the LTL orders to it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the consolidated load and links the original orders.
